ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vehicle is available */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the vehicle */,
  "kilometers_driven" INTEGER /* Total kilometers driven by the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Owner type indicating if the vehicle is new or used */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Mileage of the vehicle in km/l */,
  "engine" INTEGER /* Engine capacity in cc */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the vehicle in bhp */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "new_price" REAL /* New price of the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Current sale price of the vehicle */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company or brand of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle interior */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., Front-wheel drive, All-wheel drive) */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle (e.g., Base, Premium) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the customer purchasing the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the vehicle */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, card, financing) */,
  "financed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the purchase was financed */,
  "financing_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financing option chosen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_history" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the vehicle serviced */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the service performed */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed (e.g., Maintenance, Repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the sale associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid during the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the vehicle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Sales, Service, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member (e.g., Sales, Service, HR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the appointment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle for the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service to be performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the warranty */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period in years */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Details of the warranty coverage */,
  "warranty_type" TEXT /* Type of warranty (e.g., Comprehensive, Powertrain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranties_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_ins" (
  "trade_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade-in record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the trade-in */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being traded in */,
  "trade_in_value" REAL /* Valuation of the trade-in vehicle */,
  "trade_in_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade-in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_ins_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_ins_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financing_options" (
  "financing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing option */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the financing plan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the financing plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the plan in months */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Estimated monthly payment amount */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Required down payment amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_drives" (
  "test_drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test drive record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer requesting the test drive */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle for the test drive */,
  "test_drive_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the test drive */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test drive (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback after the test drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_drives_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_drives_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics report */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales recorded on that date */,
  "total_inventory" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles in inventory */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of vehicles on that date */,
  "top_selling_model" TEXT /* Best-selling vehicle model on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
